---
title: "Lecture 03"
author: "Bill Perry"

format:
  html:
    downloads: [docx, pptx, typst]  # This creates download links for all three
  revealjs:
    output-ext: "slides.html"
  docx: default
  pptx: default
---

# Summary of Class:
- point 1
- point 2
- point 3


# Goals for today
- point 1
- point 2
- point 3

# Slide 1
